'''''Tyrant's Bane''''' was an [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigate]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

At the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]], ''Tyrant's Bane'' and ''[[Liberty Star]]'' helped lead the attacks against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun|Golan II]] platform [[Green One]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
